name: RML Farmer - Krishi Mitr
description: RML Farmer is an mAgriculture platform with the goal of enabling farmers to make data driven choices on what crops to plant, pest control, and advice from experts in agronomy services.
sdgs: SDG 8: Decent Work and Economic Growth

taxonomy.sub_category: RML Farmer - Krishi Mitr Updated on May 24, 2024 · Created on June 20, 2017 RML Farmer - Krishi Mitr RML Farmer is an mAgriculture platform with the goal of enabling farmers to make data driven choices on what crops to plant, pest control, and advice from experts in agronomy services. Developed By RML Agtech Tested By GSMA Mobile The World Bank Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description The app provides localized data including weather, soil condition and latest market prices. The company has been developing eAgriculture applications since 2006 with Reuters Market Light an SMS application. Target SDGs SDG 1: No Poverty SDG 8: Decent Work and Economic Growth Market Suggested Retail Price $77.50 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household Distributors / Implementing Organizations RML farmer is developed and distributed by RML Agtech. Countries India Manufacturing/Building Method Mobile development. Intellectural Property Type Select Type User Provision Model Application distributed from Google Play Store and various APK sources. In app purchases/subscription upgrades are available. Distributions to Date Status Google Play Store reports 100,000-500,000 installs Mobile service required Mobile internet or Wi-Fi Devices required Android tablet or smart phone Additional features required None Permanent network connectivity required No Two way communication (Y/N) Yes Level of coverage needed 3G, 4G, or GSM Usage rate (%) Unknown Literacy support No List of languages available English, Hindi, Bengali, Gujarati, Kannada, Marathi, Punjabi, Tamil and Telugu Operating system and version Android 2.3.3 and up Power Requirements Occasional power supply for end users mAgriculture Application Connection to market, Education on sustainable farming practices, Weather information, Localization information Design Specifications RML farmer provides different functions depending on the level of subscription of the user. It includes information on 450 crop varieties, 1300 markets, 3500 weather locations across 50,000 villages and 17 states of India. The different functions are listed on the Google Play Store. They range from "CropDoc", a tool that allows farmers to identify problems with crops, to "Ask an Expert" and "Agricultural news and Events" which is a social forum for farmers. Technical Support Included in the subscription service Replacement Components N/A Lifecycle N/A Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters To enable farmers to make better decisions based on data analytics and expert guidance Vetted Performance Status -"The income of farmers using the service has increased by 15-25%" 1 -"Younger farmers selling directly to traders are able to increase their price realization by 9% as a result of using the RML service" 1 See studies in academic research.
